reasoning: The order shows Total Paid as $0.00 despite the customer claiming payment was made. The order status is 'Complete' with items marked 'Ordered', but payment method (Check/Money order) suggests payment may not have been received. Tracking indicates delivery, but customer reports non-receipt. Discrepancy between system data (no payment recorded) and customer claim requires further investigation into payment verification and shipment details before refund decision.

trajectory.thought: Need to check shipment details including tracking information to verify delivery status since customer claims package wasn't received despite tracking showing delivery.
